name: ai-chat-hub
description: AI Chat Hub - Multi-provider LLM interface with MCP support

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:render: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && DATABASE_URL="file:./prod.db" npx prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
